title: Let me know please
author: Leading-Contact-439
selftext:
Im a young day trader im 18 years old, i live in Maryland. I started learning at 15 years old because i used to want to go pro in sports but i tore my acl and just stopped playing.  Day trading is my biggest goal and it’s all i do now.. i actualy had bad depressionand was suicidal at some point and didnt finish highschool due to that.. So day trading is my main goal. It will give me the freedom i want and i can take care of myself and family well.

I recently became profitable this year and I have a track record to show to anyone.

But the main reason for this post is because I’m looking to build a partnership/relationship with someone through this that would be willing to help me with the capital side of trading. Meaning id like help from someone by funding a trading account so I can trade it since im so young i dont have a lot of money to work with. and we obviously split it and i can teach you what I know in return as well. 

I’m good enough to have a 90% win rate and I have proof! I really hope someone has the heart to trust me and give me a chance!
